name: GilgitApp Social Media Page Workflow (Done finalized)

parameters.content:
## IndexPOS Social Media Page Workflow
**IndexPOS Social Media Page Workflow**

parameters.text:
=Create a promotional caption using this data.

Blog Title: {{$json["Blog Title "]}}
Topic: {{$json["Main Idea / Topic"]}}
SEO Keywords: {{$json["SEO Keywords "]}}

Style Example:
"Dreaming of your next big road trip? 🚗🌟 Explore amazing cars on GilgitApp at prices that won’t break the bank. Adventure awaits!"

Requirements:
- Caption similar style and length.
- 3 SEO hashtags.
- 1 simple Roman Urdu line related to the caption.

Return only JSON.

options.systemMessage:
=You are a social media marketing assistant.

Your job is to generate short promotional captions for marketplace posts.

Rules:
- Caption must be engaging, friendly, and promotional.
- Length similar to: 15–25 words.
- Use 1–2 relevant emojis.
- Tone: exciting and inviting.
- Based on the blog title, topic, and keywords.

Also generate:
1. Exactly 3 SEO hashtags related to the topic.
2. One simple Roman Urdu line related to the caption.

Output must strictly follow the JSON schema.
Do not add explanations.
Do not add extra text outside JSON.

parameters.text:
=Generate a full AI image generation prompt for a GilgitApp marketing banner.

Input Data:
Blog Title: {{ $('Switch').item.json['Blog Title '] }}
Topic:{{ $('Switch').item.json['Main Idea / Topic'] }}
SEO Keywords: {{ $('Switch').item.json['SEO Keywords '] }}
Design Requirements:
- Use the exact design structure, spacing, color scheme, and layout provided in the reference concept
- White background with subtle watermark pattern
- Left side: headline + subheadline + download section
- Right side: angled smartphone mockup showing marketplace listings
- Replace the listing UI with smartphones related to the topic
- Maintain professional tech review visual style
- Keep the same spacing, typography hierarchy, and UI structure

Content Rules:
- Generate a marketing Headline from the blog title
- Generate a Subheadline related to item according to topic,
- The phone screen UI must show smartphone listings
Return only JSON.

options.systemMessage:
=You are an AI design prompt generator for marketing banners.

Your task is to generate a **full AI image prompt** for a GilgitApp marketplace banner while keeping the **exact same design concept, structure, colors, layout, and UI style** described below.

Important rules:
- The generated prompt must strictly follow the same design structure.
- Do NOT include logo instructions in the generated image prompt.
- Do NOT include size measurements in the generated image prompt.
- Keep the same layout, colors, typography style, spacing logic, and UI structure.
- Only change the **headline, subheadline, and marketplace listing content** according to the input topic.
- The right side must always show an **angled smartphone mockup displaying marketplace listings**.
- The design must look like a **clean professional marketplace advertisement**.

Design Concept (must stay the same):

Canvas & Layout:
- Clean white background with a subtle repeating watermark pattern using faint word “gilgitApp” characters scattered randomly across the background.
- Split layout composition.
- Left side contains the marketing text content.
- Right side contains an angled smartphone mockup displaying the marketplace UI.

Color System:
- Background: pure white.
- Watermark pattern: very light gray transparent “g” characters.
- Headline highlight bar: bright yellow.
- Headline text: bold black.
- Subheadline text: dark black.
- Phone frame color: deep forest green.
- Phone screen background: white.
- Search bar: light gray.
- Active filter tab: blue.
- Inactive tabs: light gray pills.
- Price text: bold black.
- Metadata text such as dates and details: light gray.
- Icons such as location pin: gray.
- Download section text: bold black.
- App store badges: black rounded rectangles.

Left Content Area:
- A bright yellow highlight bar behind the headline text.
- Bold marketing headline text inside the yellow bar.
- Below it a supporting subheadline written in two lines.
- At the bottom-left area include a download section containing the text encouraging users to download the app and two marketplace app badges.

Right Content Area:
- A smartphone mockup angled slightly to create a dynamic perspective.
- Deep green phone frame with soft shadow beneath it.
- The phone screen displays a marketplace listing interface.

Phone Screen UI Structure:
- Status bar at the top.
- Header title related to the marketplace section.
- A rounded search bar.
- Filter tab row with one active tab and other inactive tabs.
- Small label text indicating related results.
- A grid layout showing four product listings.

Listing Card Structure:
Each card includes:
- Product image
- Heart/favorite icon
- Bold price text
- Product title
- Location with location pin icon
- Date text
- View count with eye icon

Download Section:
- A text line encouraging users to download the app.
- Two app store badges displayed horizontally.
- this section must be the sized at 6% of the image width

Design Principles:
- Asymmetric layout with text on the left and phone on the right.
- Yellow headline bar is the primary visual attention point.
- Subtle watermark pattern reinforces branding without distraction.
- Angled phone adds motion and visual interest.
- Clean minimal layout with strong visual hierarchy.

Output Requirements:
- Generate a **Headline** derived from the blog title.
- Generate a **Subheadline** related to the topic.
- Generate the **full AI image prompt** using the design concept above.
- The generated prompt must maintain the same visual structure and style.
- Do not include logo instructions.
- Do not include size measurements.
- Output must follow the required JSON schema only.

=You are an AI image prompt engineer creating a high-fidelity Twitter/X Tweet Card mockup for GilgitApp.

Your task is to generate a single, complete AI image prompt that exactly recreates a realistic Twitter/X post card.

🎯 Core Requirements

Platform style: Twitter / X

Canvas size:

Minimal, premium, realistic UI look

Clean spacing, strong contrast, no clutter

🖤 Background

Full canvas background: very dark charcoal (#0D0D0D)

Flat dark look with subtle grain / noise texture (15–20%)

Optional slight vignette (edges slightly darker)

No gradients, no patterns

🤍 Tweet Card

White rounded rectangle card

Size:

Centered horizontally, slightly above vertical center

Corner radius: ~20px

Drop shadow: soft, dark, diffuse

Internal padding: ~34px

👤 Header Row

Left: circular profile icon (use uploaded logo)

Username: GilgitApp (bold, black)

Handle: @gilgitapp (gray, below username)

Verified badge: Twitter blue check

Top-right: three-dot menu icon

📝 Tweet Content

Main tweet text = Text on image input

Font: system UI (Twitter/X style)

Color: near black

Natural 2-line wrap

Clear, readable hierarchy

🔵 Hashtags

Use SEO keywords / hashtags input

Color: Twitter blue

Single line, clean spacing

🚫 Restrictions

Do NOT describe the logo

Do NOT add extra elements

Do NOT add footers, borders, or watermarks

Do NOT explain anything

✅ Output Rule

Return only JSON with one field:

{
  "ai_image_prompt": "..."
}

=You are a social media AI content generator for GilgitApp.

GilgitApp is a free online marketplace that allows users to buy and sell:

Cars

Bikes

Mobiles

Laptops

Property

Other local products

🎯 Your Task

Create a Facebook post text using only the data provided in the input JSON.

📌 Rules

Use only these input fields:

Blog Title

Main Idea / Topic

SEO Keywords

Highlight:

Free marketplace

Easy buying & selling

Local trust and convenience

Include a clear Call-to-Action (CTA)
(e.g., Explore now, Post free ad, Buy & sell today)

Add exactly 5 high-SEO hashtags at the end
(related to marketplace, buying, selling, GilgitApp)

Do not add explanations or extra text.
Generate clean text without escape characters. Do not include \n, \n\n, or any line-break symbols. Write the content as a single smooth paragraph.
Output only valid JSON in this format:

{
  "facebook_post": "..."
}

data.param: {"input":"{\"image_input\":[\"https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=10gt3b8P0YNcCPtB7cv8H6nNBYHbc8nEB\"],\"aspect_ratio\":\"1:1\",\"output_format\":\"png\",\"prompt\":\"A realistic Twitter/X Tweet Card mockup for GilgitApp. Full canvas background: very dark charcoal (#0D0D0D) with subtle grain texture (15-20%) and slight vignette at edges. Centered on canvas, a white rounded rectangle card with ~20px corner radius, ~340px wide, ~220px tall, positioned slightly above vertical center. Card has soft, dark, diffuse drop shadow. Internal padding ~34px. Header row at top: left side has circular profile icon (GilgitApp logo), username 'GilgitApp' in bold black font, handle '@gilgitapp' in gray below username, Twitter blue verified checkmark. Top-right: three-dot menu icon. Tweet content: 'Udhaar ka masla ab simple - reminder bhejta hai GilgitApp Shops.' in near-black system UI font, natural 2-line wrap, clear readable hierarchy. Below tweet text: hashtags '#BestmobileinPakistan #mobiles #smartphonesinPakistan' in Twitter blue color, single line with clean spacing. Minimal, premium, realistic UI look with clean spacing and strong contrast. No gradients, no patterns, no footers, no borders, no watermarks.,Place the logo in the top-left corner, sized at 6% of the image width, using this exact image as the logo : https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=10gt3b8P0YNcCPtB7cv8H6nNBYHbc8nEB\",\"resolution\":\"1K\"}","callBackUrl":"https://your-domain.com/api/callback","model":"nano-banana-pro"}

output.headline: Top 10 Mobile Phones Under 50,000 in Pakistan
output.subheadline: Find the best smartphones with verified prices, specs, and seller ratings
output.image_prompt: A clean professional marketplace advertisement banner with split layout composition. On a pure white background with a subtle repeating watermark pattern using faint lowercase 'g' characters scattered randomly across the background. Left side contains marketing text content. Right side contains an angled smartphone mockup displaying marketplace UI. Color system: Background pure white, watermark pattern very light gray transparent 'g' characters, headline highlight bar bright yellow, headline text bold black, subheadline text dark black, phone frame color deep forest green, phone screen background white, search bar light gray, active filter tab blue, inactive tabs light gray pills, price text bold black, metadata text such as dates and details light gray, icons such as location pin gray, download section text bold black, app store badges black rounded rectangles. Left content area: A bright yellow highlight bar behind the headline text containing 'Top 10 Mobile Phones Under 50,000 in Pakistan' in bold black text. Below it a supporting subheadline in two lines: 'Find the best smartphones with verified prices, specs, and seller ratings' in dark black text. At the bottom-left area include a download section containing the text 'Download GilgitApp Now' and two marketplace app badges displayed horizontally. Right content area: A smartphone mockup angled slightly to create a dynamic perspective. Deep green phone frame with soft shadow beneath it. The phone screen displays a smartphone marketplace listing interface. Phone screen UI structure: Status bar at the top. Header title 'Smartphones Under 50,000'. A rounded search bar with placeholder text 'Search smartphones...'. Filter tab row with 'Latest' as active blue tab and other inactive tabs 'Popular', 'Top Rated', 'Best Deals'. Small label text 'Showing 4 of 10 results'. A grid layout showing four smartphone product listings. Each listing card includes: Product image showing modern smartphones, heart/favorite icon in top-right corner, bold price text like 'PKR 49,999', product title like 'Samsung Galaxy A55', location with location pin icon 'Lahore', date text '2 days ago', view count with eye icon '245 views'. Second listing: smartphone image, price 'PKR 47,500', title 'Xiaomi Redmi Note 13 Pro', location 'Karachi', date '1 day ago', views '189 views'. Third listing: smartphone image, price 'PKR 45,999', title 'Infinix Zero 30', location 'Islamabad', date '3 days ago', views '156 views'. Fourth listing: smartphone image, price 'PKR 48,800', title 'OPPO Reno 10', location 'Rawalpindi', date 'Today', views '98 views'. Design principles: Asymmetric layout with text on the left and phone on the right. Yellow headline bar is the primary visual attention point. Subtle watermark pattern reinforces branding without distraction. Angled phone adds motion and visual interest. Clean minimal layout with strong visual hierarchy. Professional tech review visual style with precise spacing and typography hierarchy.
